notes: quincemil.es publisher concentration (2/5 sources = 40%) — documented as structural characteristic of A Coruña media landscape; no alternative qualified. EN diversity gate UNMET — structural characteristic per Part 1 note. Árbore da Veira excluded (Michelin 1★). El Refugio (Oleiros) excluded (outside city boundary). Salitre retained despite theobjective.com 2023 labelling it Michelin-starred — quincemil.es Nov 2024 lists it as Selected only; not on MICHELIN_STARRED_EXCLUSIONS list.
